# 🧬 CGT 每日情报 (Daily Brief)
> **日期**: 2026-04-10 | **更新时间**: 07:04 (北京时间)
> **监控范围**: Global (In vivo/FDA) & China (NMPA/Biotech)

---

## 🌍 全球前沿 (FDA / In vivo / MNCs)
- `[06:00]` **Ossium Health 为印第安纳州州长 Mike Braun 和医疗保健领导人举办设施参观和招待会**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Ossium Health Hosts Facility Tour and Reception for Indiana Governor Mike Braun and Healthcare Leaders* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[20:00]` **Coya Therapeutics 宣布发表出版物，证明纵向生物标志物数据与临床结果之间的相关性，支持 COYA 302 在 ALS 患者中的机制原理**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Coya Therapeutics Announces Publication Demonstrating Correlation Between Longitudinal Biomarker Data and Clinical Outcomes Supporting the Mechanistic Rationale for COYA 302 in Patients with ALS* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[20:00]` **Thermo Fisher Scientific 通过与新加坡 PRECISE-SG100K 的战略合作扩大全球生物库领导地位，推进群体规模蛋白质组学**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Thermo Fisher Scientific Expands Global Biobank Leadership Through Strategic Collaboration with PRECISE-SG100K Singapore to Advance Population-Scale Proteomics* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[20:00]` **CMS 为 Tyenne® (tocilizumab-aazg) 授予 Fresenius Kabi COVID-19 适应症特定 HCPCS 代码**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *CMS Grants Fresenius Kabi COVID-19 Indication-Specific HCPCS Codes for Tyenne® (tocilizumab-aazg)* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[18:09]` **全球首个实体瘤CAR-T疗法即将在中国上市**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *World's First CAR-T Therapy for Solid Tumors Available in China Soon* [🔗Source](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMixwFBVV95cUxPZTlXRnl6YXhBVmdic1l4dXAzRzY1YUJpSGtGUHRMYi1KcXFxeGJiU3lZSGFqTUtxT0hRejJXUTNHUXVVNXQ2NDZtNXRNNU52WWZOUzY1dzFHeXltMDBRTzd2LUJMTVFfdkVjTjNETnpqRXplVjJvY0JpX1d3eHhWb2ZOUlF2WE9xTWZNZlp0VlNlMUdOd01CemJvS2JQWlg3SHBNQUhSOHdWMEhGWDd1UHJVQ3VaRkI1UzdFZXN2Zm1Pb3h5Vk53?oc=5)</small>
